params.TriggerDescription: When you planeswalk to CARDNAME or at the beginning of your precombat main phase, put a charge counter on CARDNAME, then add {R} for each charge counter on it.
When you planeswalk to CARDNAME or at the beginning of your precombat main phase, put a charge counter on CARDNAME, then add {R} for each charge counter on it.
Whenever chaos ensues, you may pay {X}. If you do, CARDNAME deals X damage to any target.
